'''竏嗾-dh-d-y''' ('''katadhdeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:axiologize|axiologize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:axiologize|axiologize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-dh-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| katadhdeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadhdeyoko|thitadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jitadhdeyoko|jitadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shitadhdeyoko|shitadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kitadhdeyoko|kitadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadhdeyoko|thuthutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jujutadhdeyoko|jujutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shushutadhdeyoko|shushutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kukutadhdeyoko|kukutadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadhdeyoko|thutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jutadhdeyoko|jutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shutadhdeyoko|shutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kutadhdeyoko|kutadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadhdeyoko|thutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jutadhdeyoko|jutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shutadhdeyoko|shutadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kutadhdeyoko|kutadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadhdeyoko|thetadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jetadhdeyoko|jetadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shetadhdeyoko|shetadhdeyoko]] || [[word:ketadhdeyoko|ketadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadhdeyoko|thothotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jojotadhdeyoko|jojotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shoshotadhdeyoko|shoshotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kokotadhdeyoko|kokotadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadhdeyoko|thotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jotadhdeyoko|jotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shotadhdeyoko|shotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kotadhdeyoko|kotadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadhdeyoko|thotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jotadhdeyoko|jotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shotadhdeyoko|shotadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kotadhdeyoko|kotadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtadhdeyoko|thﾃｦtadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦtadhdeyoko|jﾃｦtadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦtadhdeyoko|shﾃｦtadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦtadhdeyoko|kﾃｦtadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadhdeyoko|thathatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jajatadhdeyoko|jajatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shashatadhdeyoko|shashatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:kakatadhdeyoko|kakatadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadhdeyoko|thatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jatadhdeyoko|jatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shatadhdeyoko|shatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:katadhdeyoko|katadhdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadhdeyoko|thatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:jatadhdeyoko|jatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:shatadhdeyoko|shatadhdeyoko]] || [[word:katadhdeyoko|katadhdeyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
